001101111110101010110000000111100100100101 - ASI: 21

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 00 * 1
  101 = 10 * 1
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0101 = 0 * 101
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00100 = 001 * 00
  10101 = 10 * 101
  001101 = 001 * 101
  001111 = 00 * 1111
  010110 = 0101 * 10
  100101 = 10 * 0101
  0000001111 = 0000 * 001111
  0011011111 = 001101 * 1111
  00100100101 = 00100 * 100101
  10101010110 = 10101 * 010110
  000000111100100100101 = 0000001111 * 00100100101
  001101111110101010110 = 0011011111 * 10101010110
  001101111110101010110000000111100100100101 = 001101111110101010110 * 000000111100100100101
